name: desal_brine_outfall_coral_spawning_window_delay
premise: Desalination plant superintendent Casey Zhang must decide whether to delay high-salinity brine outfall flushing until after mass coral spawning when spawning models disagree with vendor dilution charts. Engineer Bram Rivera says holding tanks reach ninety percent by Tuesday, risking shutdown of potable output during heat. Flushing now may bleach larvae on a recovering reef tourists fund through hotel taxes. Missing the window may breach water contracts with inland farms. External scrutiny from regulators and community observers has intensified because the outcome could redefine expectations in Marine Conservation. The dilemma is widely framed as a care vs fairness tradeoff under incomplete information and tightening deadlines that discourage indefinite delay.

agents.name: Casey Zhang
agents.identity: I am the desal superintendent accountable for potable output contracts, reef mitigation covenants, and heat-wave demand spikes on the same trunk lines.
agents.goal: I want taps flowing without becoming the official who wiped a spawning year the reef economy depends on.

agents.name: Bram Rivera
agents.identity: I am the chief engineer who modeled tank headroom and who believes staged night flushing with diffusers can thread the needle if we start tonight.
agents.goal: I want staged flushing now because tank overflow shuts down dialysis centers downstream per intertie agreements.

choices: I will delay flushing until spawning ends and truck brine to offshore barges for temporary storage, accepting truck traffic complaints and spill tail risks on roads.
I will begin immediate staged night flushing with maximum diffuser flow and extra reef monitoring buoys, accepting measurable larval stress if models underestimated plumes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Hotel tax commissioners and dialysis clinics are on a three-way call. Casey Zhang must choose between trucking brine with delayed flushing or immediate staged night flushing with diffusers. What does Casey Zhang do?
